---
title: "Continuous Panel Measles Report"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    embed-resources: true
jupyter: python3
---

```{python Import python modules}
# | label: setup
# | echo: false
import os
import pickle
import numpy as np
import pandas as pd
from plotnine import *
import pypomp as pp
import jax
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
from IPython.display import display
```

```{python Load data in python}
# | echo: false
PKL_PATH_IF2 = "IF2_results/panel_measles_results_rl4.pkl"
try:
    pomp_obj = pickle.load(open(PKL_PATH_IF2, "rb"))
except FileNotFoundError:
    print(f"File not found: {PKL_PATH_IF2}. Waiting for results...")
    pomp_obj = None

PKL_PATH_IFAD = "IFAD_results/panel_measles_results_rl4.pkl"
try:
    pomp_obj_ifad = pickle.load(open(PKL_PATH_IFAD, "rb"))
except FileNotFoundError:
    print(f"File not found: {PKL_PATH_IFAD}. Waiting for results...")
    pomp_obj_ifad = None
```

```{python Make basic frame}
# | echo: false
if pomp_obj is not None:
    LL_frame = pomp_obj.results()
    traces_raw = pomp_obj.traces()
    traces = traces_raw.rename(
        columns={"replicate": "rep", "iteration": "iter", "loglik": "logLik"}
    )
    id_cols = ["rep", "iter", "logLik", "method", "unit", "shared loglik"]
    # Ensure id_cols exists in columns (some might be missing in older versions)
    id_cols = [c for c in id_cols if c in traces.columns]
    
    param_cols = [c for c in traces.columns if c not in id_cols]
    traces_long = traces.melt(
        id_vars=id_cols,
        value_vars=param_cols,
        var_name="quantity",
        value_name="param_value",
    )
    # Thin traces for plotting to avoid OOM on login node
    # Use 1/10th of iterations for plotting
    traces_long_plot = traces_long[traces_long["iter"] % 10 == 0].copy()
    # Create group variable for plotting since 'interaction' helper isn't in plotnine
    traces_long_plot["group_var"] = traces_long_plot["rep"].astype(str) + "_" + traces_long_plot["unit"].astype(str)

else:
    traces_long = pd.DataFrame()
    traces = pd.DataFrame()
    traces_long_plot = pd.DataFrame()

```

```{python Make basic frame for IFAD}
# | echo: false
if pomp_obj_ifad is not None:
    LL_frame_ifad = pomp_obj_ifad.results()
    traces_raw_ifad = pomp_obj_ifad.traces()
    traces_ifad = traces_raw_ifad.rename(
        columns={"replicate": "rep", "iteration": "iter", "loglik": "logLik"}
    )
    id_cols_ifad = ["rep", "iter", "logLik", "method", "unit", "shared loglik"]
    id_cols_ifad = [c for c in id_cols_ifad if c in traces_ifad.columns]
    
    param_cols_ifad = [c for c in traces_ifad.columns if c not in id_cols_ifad]
    traces_long_ifad = traces_ifad.melt(
        id_vars=id_cols_ifad,
        value_vars=param_cols_ifad,
        var_name="quantity",
        value_name="param_value",
    )
    # Thin traces for plotting
    traces_long_ifad_plot = traces_long_ifad[traces_long_ifad["iter"] % 10 == 0].copy()
    # Create group variable
    traces_long_ifad_plot["group_var"] = traces_long_ifad_plot["rep"].astype(str) + "_" + traces_long_ifad_plot["unit"].astype(str)

else:
    traces_long_ifad = pd.DataFrame()
    traces_ifad = pd.DataFrame()
    traces_long_ifad_plot = pd.DataFrame()

```

# Results

## Times

```{python}
# | label: times
# | echo: false

print("IF2:")
if pomp_obj is not None:
    print(pomp_obj.time())
print("\nIFAD:")
if pomp_obj_ifad is not None:
    print(pomp_obj_ifad.time())
```

## Verbose summary

```{python}
# | label: verbose-summary
# | echo: false

print("IF2:")
if pomp_obj is not None:
    print(pomp_obj.print_summary())
print("\nIFAD:")
if pomp_obj_ifad is not None:
    print(pomp_obj_ifad.print_summary())
```

## Parameter traces

### IF2

```{python}
# | label: plot-param-traces
# | fig-width: 12
# | fig-height: 12
# | echo: false
if not traces_long_plot.empty:
    for unit in sorted(traces_long_plot["unit"].unique()):
        unit_data = traces_long_plot[traces_long_plot["unit"] == unit]
        p = (
            ggplot(
                unit_data,
                aes(x="iter", y="param_value", group="rep", color="factor(rep)"),
            )
            + geom_line(show_legend=False, alpha=0.5)
            + facet_wrap("quantity", scales="free_y")
            + labs(title=f"Parameter traces - {unit} (IF2)")
        )
        display(p)




```

### IFAD

```{python}
# | label: plot-param-traces-ifad
# | fig-width: 12
# | fig-height: 12
# | echo: false
if not traces_long_ifad_plot.empty:
    for unit in sorted(traces_long_ifad_plot["unit"].unique()):
        unit_data = traces_long_ifad_plot[traces_long_ifad_plot["unit"] == unit]
        p = (
            ggplot(
                unit_data,
                aes(x="iter", y="param_value", group="rep", color="factor(rep)"),
            )
            + geom_line(show_legend=False, alpha=0.5)
            + facet_wrap("quantity", scales="free_y")
            + labs(title=f"Parameter traces - {unit} (IFAD)")
        )
        display(p)




```

## LogLik traces

### IF2

```{python}
# | label: plot-loglik-traces
# | fig-width: 10
# | fig-height: 6
# | echo: false
if not traces.empty and "unit loglik" in traces.columns:
    for unit in sorted(traces["unit"].unique()):
        unit_ll = traces[traces["unit"] == unit]
        p = (
            ggplot(unit_ll, aes(x="iter", y="unit loglik", group="rep", color="factor(rep)"))
            + geom_line(show_legend=False)
            + labs(title=f"Unit logLik traces - {unit} (IF2)")
        )
        display(p)


```

### IFAD

```{python}
# | label: plot-loglik-traces-ifad
# | fig-width: 10
# | fig-height: 6
# | echo: false
if not traces_ifad.empty and "unit loglik" in traces_ifad.columns:
    for unit in sorted(traces_ifad["unit"].unique()):
        unit_ll_ifad = traces_ifad[traces_ifad["unit"] == unit]
        p = (
            ggplot(unit_ll_ifad, aes(x="iter", y="unit loglik", group="rep", color="factor(rep)"))
            + geom_line(show_legend=False)
            + labs(title=f"Unit logLik traces - {unit} (IFAD)")
        )
        display(p)


```

## Final logLik density

```{python}
# | label: final-loglik
# | echo: false
pfilter_traces = traces_long[traces_long["method"] == "pfilter"]
last_pfilter_iter = pfilter_traces.groupby(["rep", "unit"])["iter"].transform("max")
final_loglik = pfilter_traces.loc[
    pfilter_traces["iter"] == last_pfilter_iter, ["rep", "unit", "logLik"]
].drop_duplicates(subset=["rep", "unit"])

# Filter out insanely low logLiks
filtered_frames = []
for unit in final_loglik["unit"].unique():
    unit_ll = final_loglik[final_loglik["unit"] == unit]
    q1 = unit_ll["logLik"].quantile(0.25)
    q3 = unit_ll["logLik"].quantile(0.75)
    iqr = q3 - q1
    threshold = max(q1 - 3 * iqr, -10000)
    
    omitted = unit_ll[unit_ll["logLik"] < threshold]
    if len(omitted) > 0:
        print(f"Omitted {len(omitted)} logLik values below threshold {threshold:.2f} for unit {unit}:")
        print(omitted[["rep", "logLik"]].to_string(index=False))
        print()
    filtered_frames.append(unit_ll[unit_ll["logLik"] >= threshold])

if len(filtered_frames) > 0:
    final_loglik_filtered = pd.concat(filtered_frames, ignore_index=True)
else:
    final_loglik_filtered = pd.DataFrame(columns=["rep", "unit", "logLik"])

final_loglik_filtered["method"] = "IF2"
```

```{python}
# | label: final-loglik-ifad
# | echo: false
pfilter_traces_ifad = traces_long_ifad[traces_long_ifad["method"] == "pfilter"]
last_pfilter_iter_ifad = pfilter_traces_ifad.groupby(["rep", "unit"])["iter"].transform("max")
final_loglik_ifad = pfilter_traces_ifad.loc[
    pfilter_traces_ifad["iter"] == last_pfilter_iter_ifad, ["rep", "unit", "logLik"]
].drop_duplicates(subset=["rep", "unit"])

filtered_frames_ifad = []
for unit in final_loglik_ifad["unit"].unique():
    unit_ll_ifad = final_loglik_ifad[final_loglik_ifad["unit"] == unit]
    q1_ifad = unit_ll_ifad["logLik"].quantile(0.25)
    q3_ifad = unit_ll_ifad["logLik"].quantile(0.75)
    iqr_ifad = q3_ifad - q1_ifad
    threshold_ifad = max(q1_ifad - 3 * iqr_ifad, -10000)
    
    omitted_ifad = unit_ll_ifad[unit_ll_ifad["logLik"] < threshold_ifad]
    if len(omitted_ifad) > 0:
        print(f"Omitted {len(omitted_ifad)} logLik values below threshold {threshold_ifad:.2f} for unit {unit}:")
        print(omitted_ifad[["rep", "logLik"]].to_string(index=False))
        print()
    filtered_frames_ifad.append(unit_ll_ifad[unit_ll_ifad["logLik"] >= threshold_ifad])

if len(filtered_frames_ifad) > 0:
    final_loglik_filtered_ifad = pd.concat(filtered_frames_ifad, ignore_index=True)
else:
    final_loglik_filtered_ifad = pd.DataFrame(columns=["rep", "unit", "logLik"])

final_loglik_filtered_ifad["method"] = "IFAD"
```

```{python}
# | label: combine-loglik-data
# | echo: false
final_loglik_combined = pd.concat([
    final_loglik_filtered[["unit", "logLik", "method"]],
    final_loglik_filtered_ifad[["unit", "logLik", "method"]]
], ignore_index=True)
```

### Summary statistics

#### IF2

```{python}
# | label: loglik-summary-stats
# | echo: false
loglik_summary = (
    final_loglik_filtered.groupby("unit")["logLik"]
    .agg(["count", "mean", "std", "min", "median", "max"])
    .round(2)
)
loglik_summary.columns = ["N", "Mean", "Std", "Min", "Median", "Max"]
print("IF2:")
print(loglik_summary.to_string())
```

#### IFAD

```{python}
# | label: loglik-summary-stats-ifad
# | echo: false
if not final_loglik_filtered_ifad.empty:
    loglik_summary_ifad = (
        final_loglik_filtered_ifad.groupby("unit")["logLik"]
        .agg(["count", "mean", "std", "min", "median", "max"])
        .round(2)
    )
    loglik_summary_ifad.columns = ["N", "Mean", "Std", "Min", "Median", "Max"]
    print("\nIFAD:")
    print(loglik_summary_ifad.to_string())
else:
    print("\nIFAD:\nNo data")
```

```{python}
# | label: plot-loglik-density
# | fig-width: 8
# | fig-height: 5
# | echo: false
if not final_loglik_combined.empty:
    for unit in sorted(final_loglik_combined["unit"].unique()):
        unit_data = final_loglik_combined[final_loglik_combined["unit"] == unit]
        p = (
            ggplot(unit_data, aes(x="logLik", fill="method", color="method"))
            + geom_density(alpha=0.5)
            + labs(x="logLik", title=f"Final logLik density - {unit}", fill="Method", color="Method")
            + scale_fill_manual(values={"IF2": "steelblue", "IFAD": "coral"})
            + scale_color_manual(values={"IF2": "steelblue", "IFAD": "coral"})
        )
        display(p)
```

## Final parameter density

```{python}
# | label: final-params
# | echo: false
last_iter = traces_long.groupby(["rep", "unit"])["iter"].transform("max")
final_params = traces_long[traces_long["iter"] == last_iter].copy()
final_params["method"] = "IF2"
```

```{python}
# | label: final-params-ifad
# | echo: false
last_iter_ifad = traces_long_ifad.groupby(["rep", "unit"])["iter"].transform("max")
final_params_ifad = traces_long_ifad[traces_long_ifad["iter"] == last_iter_ifad].copy()
final_params_ifad["method"] = "IFAD"
```

```{python}
# | label: combine-params-data
# | echo: false
final_params_combined = pd.concat([
    final_params,
    final_params_ifad
], ignore_index=True)
```

```{python}
# | label: plot-param-density
# | fig-width: 10
# | fig-height: 10
# | echo: false
if not final_params_combined.empty:
    for unit in sorted(final_params_combined["unit"].unique()):
        unit_data = final_params_combined[final_params_combined["unit"] == unit]
        p = (
            ggplot(unit_data, aes(x="param_value", fill="method", color="method"))
            + geom_density(alpha=0.5)
            + facet_wrap("quantity", scales="free")
            + labs(x="estimate", title=f"Final parameter density - {unit}", fill="Method", color="Method")
            + scale_fill_manual(values={"IF2": "steelblue", "IFAD": "coral"})
            + scale_color_manual(values={"IF2": "steelblue", "IFAD": "coral"})
        )
        display(p)
```
